Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: evening suits [300425177], suits (main garments) [300209863], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: evening wear [300403909], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Semiformal evening suits consisting of a dinner jacket and trousers, the trousers having a stripe of material, such as silk or faille, down the outside of the legs. May also include a bow tie, cummerbund, and a shirt.

Traje de noche semiformal consistente en una chaqueta y unos pantalones de cena, teniendo los pantalones unas listas de material tal como seda o falla, bajando por la parte exterior de las piernas. Puede también incluir lazo y una camisa

Semiformele avondkostuums die bestaan uit een jasje, zonder taille en met satijnen of faille revers, en een broek met langs de buitennaad van de pijpen een bies van zijde of faille; gedragen met bijpassend overhemd, strikje, cummerbund of vest.

Source.Source_ID: 2000051231/The Oxford- Duden Pictorial Spanish and English Dictionary (1995)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Halbformeller Abendanzug, bestehend aus einer Smokingjacke und einer Hose; die Hose besitzt an der Außenseite der Beine einen Materialstreifen, z.B. Seide oder Faille. Kann auch eine Fliege, einen Kummerbund und ein Hemd beinhalten.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
